title: Sentinel Shield release evidence record
description: Records the REAL consumer-project CI runs that back a Sentinel Shield release stage. Lives at evidence/releases/<version>.json. The machinery is fail-closed: an empty consumer_runs[] with all required_evidence flags false is the honest 'no proof yet' state and MUST NOT satisfy any stage gate. Every consumer_run must carry verifiable, well-formed proof handles (real 40-hex commits, a positive-integer workflow run id, a canonical GitHub Actions run URL, and per-artifact records) so that a free-form string can never masquerade as evidence. Contains NO secrets, tokens, or credentials.

allOf.$comment: Once any real evidence exists (a consumer run is recorded or any required_evidence flag is true), engine_commit must be a real 40-hex SHA, never the 'unknown' draft placeholder.

version.description: Release version this evidence file documents, e.g. '2.0.0' or '2.0.0-beta.1'.

engine_commit.description: Full (40 lowercase hex) Sentinel Shield engine commit SHA the consumer runs exercised. The literal 'unknown' is permitted ONLY for an honest no-evidence draft (empty consumer_runs[] and all required_evidence false).

consumer_runs.description: One entry per real consumer-project workflow run. Empty array means no proof has been collected yet.

stack.description: The evidence dimension this run proves. Mirrors a required_evidence key.

repository.description: Consumer repository the run executed against, in owner/repo form, e.g. 'org/laravel-demo'.

commit.description: Consumer-project commit SHA the run exercised (40 lowercase hex).

sentinel_shield_commit.description: Sentinel Shield engine commit the run consumed (40 lowercase hex). Must equal the top-level engine_commit.

profile.description: Sentinel Shield profile used, e.g. 'laravel' or 'laravel-react-docker'. Must be compatible with stack.

workflow_run_id.description: GitHub Actions run identifier: a positive integer (or its decimal string form). Must equal the run id embedded in workflow_url. Never fabricate.

workflow_url.description: Canonical GitHub Actions run URL: https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>/actions/runs/<run_id>. Its owner/repo must equal repository and its run id must equal workflow_run_id.

result.description: Final result of the run. Only 'success' counts toward a stage gate.

artifacts.description: Per-artifact records (reports / SBOM) published by the run. Each must reference a real artifact id+name; an artifact-verified run must list at least one and every listed artifact must be verified.

name.description: Artifact name as published by the run.

verified.description: True when this artifact was fetched and verified, not merely assumed.

artifacts_verified.description: Summary flag: true when the run's published artifacts were fetched and verified. When true, artifacts[] must be non-empty and result must be 'success'.

verified_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (…Z) when this evidence was verified.

verification_method.description: How the run was verified, e.g. 'github-api' or 'github-api+rollback-replay'. Rollback dimensions must describe an actual rollback test.

required_evidence.description: Honest per-dimension proof flags. A flag is true ONLY when a successful, artifact-verified consumer run backs it. All-false is the legitimate no-evidence-yet state.
